notes:
RetinaTag 1.5.71 — Windows + macOS

Highlights:
- AI-powered photo tagging (multi-provider routing)
- Semantic search via CLIP
- On-device face recognition
- Vault for private photos (AES-256 file encryption, BIP39 recovery, Windows Hello / Touch ID)
- iPhone / MTP import
- Cross-platform auto-updater

v1.5.71 specific:
- Search overhaul: stop-word filtering, per-concept AND logic, Turkish vehicle disambiguation
- Trending Tags panel removed (per user request)

Windows: x86_64 NSIS installer.
macOS: Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3+). Intel Mac on the roadmap.
